creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Walter Schwarzenfeld from comment #3)
> How you get this, I don't get this messages.

See https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-prefix.html (check-plist, stage-qa), also https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing-poudriere.html
